title: HardcoreAbsorptionFix
description: HAF changes absorption hearts to the hardcore heart style, making the heart icon fit better with the red hardcore hearts. Perfect for players who play Minecraft Hardcore often.
body:
HAF: HardcoreAbsorptionFix is a lightweight, client-side resource pack that transforms Minecraft’s absorption hearts into the hardcore heart style. Players who enjoy hardcore survival know that every heart counts, and this pack makes your absorption hearts visually consistent with the iconic red hardcore hearts, giving your health bar a more intense, immersive look. Whether you’re braving mobs, exploring dangerous terrain, or just want a cleaner UI, HAF makes your extra hearts feel like they truly belong in hardcore mode.

Key Features:

Hardcore Heart Style: Converts all absorption hearts into the classic hardcore red hearts for a unified, polished look.

Minimal & Lightweight: Only modifies the absorption hearts; all other textures remain untouched.

Compatible with Any Pack: Works alongside your favorite texture pack without conflicts.

Survival & Hardcore Friendly: Perfect for hardcore players or anyone who wants their health bar to look sharper and more cohesive.

Installation Instructions:

1. Download the HAF: HardcoreAbsorptionFix zip.

2. Move the HAF: HardcoreAbsorptionFix folder into your Minecraft resourcepacks directory.

- Windows: %appdata%\.minecraft\resourcepacks

- macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/minecraft/resourcepacks
  
3. Launch Minecraft, go to Options → Resource Packs, and enable HAF: HardcoreAbsorptionFix.

Layer it on top of any other resource pack if desired.

Notes:

Fully client-side; no server mods required.

Works on all supported Minecraft versions (1.20+ recommended).

Ideal for hardcore survival, PvP servers, or just giving your health bar a clean, cohesive look.
